mapper.select: SELECT sm.id, sm.parent_id, sm.name, sm.url, sm.icon, sm.sort_order, sm.open_style FROM sys_menu sm JOIN sys_role_menu srm ON srm.menu_id = sm.id JOIN sys_user_role sur ON srm.role_id = sur.role_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT sm.id, sm.name, sm.parent_id,
CASE WHEN srm.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS checked
false AS checked
FROM sys_menu sm
LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu srm ON srm.menu_id = sm.id AND srm.role_id = #{roleId}
ORDER BY sm.sort_order DESC
SELECT sur.user_id from sys_user_role sur JOIN sys_role_menu srm on sur.role_id = srm.role_id WHERE srm.menu_id = #{menuId}
